title: Solitaire Grand Harvest
description: Solitaire Grand Harvest: the go-to Tripeaks Solitaire game for Solitaire card game fans! Are you a fan of online card games? Introducing Solitaire Grand Harvest, a TriPeaks solitaire card game created especially for you. Enjoy this relaxing Tripeaks solitaire game and build the cutest farm as you go.
instructions: Your objective is to beat the levels containing solitaire Tripeaks games with variable difficulty Each level earns you up to three stars The more stars you earn the more you grow your farm
